symbols.name: AppGuiLocator
symbols.doc: AppGuiLocator defines a locator interface for a rectangular region on a mobile app screen,

symbols.name: AppGuiWindow
symbols.doc: AppGuiWindow defines the interface of a mobile app window (screen), providing methods

symbols.name: AppKey
symbols.doc: AppKey represents a hardware or system key on a mobile device.

symbols.name: KeyBack
symbols.doc: Navigation keys

symbols.name: KeyEnter
symbols.doc: Soft keyboard keys

symbols.name: KeyPower
symbols.doc: Power key

symbols.name: KeyVolumeUp
symbols.doc: Volume keys

symbols.name: FPoint
symbols.doc: FPoint represents a 2D floating-point coordinate point.

symbols.name: MaxAreaRect
symbols.doc: MaxAreaRect returns the rectangle with the largest area.

symbols.name: MergeAllRectangles
symbols.doc: MergeAllRectangles merges all rectangles into the smallest rectangle containing all of them.

symbols.name: MergeGroupRectangles
symbols.doc: MergeGroupRectangles merges rectangles from multiple groups in all possible combinations.

symbols.name: MergeOverlappingRectangles
symbols.doc: MergeOverlappingRectangles merges overlapping rectangles.

symbols.name: MinAreaRect
symbols.doc: MinAreaRect returns the rectangle with the smallest area.

symbols.name: OcrResult
symbols.doc: OcrResult represents the OCR recognition result of the entire image.

symbols.name: OcrText
symbols.doc: OcrText represents a single OCR text recognition result.

symbols.name: Point
symbols.doc: Point represents a 2D integer coordinate point.

symbols.name: Rect
symbols.doc: Rect represents a rectangular region, defined by the top-left coordinate and width/height.

symbols.name: Size
symbols.doc: Size represents width and height.

symbols.name: BrowserElement
symbols.doc: BrowserElement defines the common operation interface for browser elements.

symbols.name: BrowserFramePage
symbols.doc: BrowserFramePage defines the common interface for browser pages or frame pages.

symbols.name: BrowserTabPage

symbols.name: BrowserWindow
symbols.doc: BrowserWindow defines the browser window interface.

symbols.doc: OSGuiLocator defines a locator interface that provides methods for retrieving locator information,

symbols.doc: DeviceInfo defines capabilities for querying device information.

symbols.name: ScriptLogger

symbols.name: Event
